The Market
02
01 · Why This Program Exists

The market didn't slow down.
It changed shape.

India's Global Capability Centers are hiring for a different engineer than they were two years ago. Demand for AI talent has surged over 300% since 2024 — and the supply simply isn't there.

THE AI TALENT CHASM · INDIA, BY END OF 2026
~1M
AI roles projected
~120K
trained AI professionals today
53%
AI skills deficit — for every two roles posted, fewer than one qualified engineer exists.
71%
of hiring managers now pick AI skills over seniority
30-60%
pay premium for GenAI engineers over adjacent roles
70%
of GCCs now hire on skills, not job titles
Sources: NASSCOM, Zinnov & EY GCC research 2026 · Microsoft + LinkedIn Work Trend Index
×
The Problem
03
02 · The Real Wall

Knowing AI isn't the wall.
Proving it is.

The engineers who stall aren't the ones who can't learn AI. They're the ones who specialised before they built a foundation — strong on agents, screened out at the coding round. Or strong on both, invisible to recruiters.

WHERE EARLY-CAREER ENGINEERS GET STOPPED
The resume gate
AI screens out 60-89%% of resumes before a human reads one
<5%%
The coding round
Strong AI portfolios rejected for medium-level DSA they never drilled
most
The recruiter wall
90%% of roles fill through referral — not the apply button
90%%

"I spent 16 months building multi-agent AI systems. I still get rejected — at the DSA round."

A pattern repeated across the 2024–2026 batches. This program is built to close all three gaps at once.
×
Who It's For
04
03 · Who This Is For

Built for the engineers
who get through.

For tech professionals with less than 5 years of experience — working, between roles, or about to start — who are ready to build the proof that clears every gate.

🎓
Freshers & Final-Year Students

Final-year B.E./B.Tech students and new grads who need proof of delivery, not just a marksheet. No prior AI/ML experience required.

💻
Early-Tech Professionals

0–5 YOE engineers across Android, Backend, Data, DevOps, Frontend, Full Stack, iOS, ML, SRE and QE ready to move faster than their current track allows.

→
Career Switchers

Engineers pivoting into AI-native roles who need a structured, credible path — and a portfolio recruiters actually recognise.

One prerequisite:basic programming in any language + core CS concepts. That's it.

The Journey
06
05 · Your Transformation

From "I know ChatGPT"
to "here's what I shipped."

WHERE YOU START

You've used AI tools. You've read about agents. You're not sure how any of it becomes an offer.

WHERE YOU FINISH

A shipped multi-agent app, coding rounds cleared, and a recruiter who knows your name.

0
Foundation
Get fluent in Python — the language every AI tool runs on.
Weeks 1-6
1

Weeks 7-11

Weeks 12-14

Resume, mocks, and a recruiter who puts your profile in front of the right people.

The Network
07
06 · Why Talent500

The apply button is a black box.
A referral isn't.

Skills get you ready. Getting seen is a different problem. This program is delivered with Talent500, which connects engineers in India to curated roles at leading GCCs and multinationals — the difference between applying into the void and being put forward.

01
90%% of roles never hit a job board

Most GCC and product roles fill through referral and curated networks. Talent500 is that network — not another apply button.

02
Direct GCC & Fortune 500 access

A hiring pipeline spanning Global Capability Centers, MNCs, product companies and Fortune 500 organisations.

03
Curated, not mass-market

Structured career journeys and exclusive roles — your profile matched to openings, not lost in a stack of 2,000 applications.

04
Assessment-backed readiness

Complete assessments that prove your readiness for GCC hiring — the signal recruiters trust over a keyword-stuffed resume.

×
DSA
09
CLEARS: THE CODING ROUND
08 · Track 1 of 3

The gate that stops
most AI builders.

One week of AI-powered interview prep with Claude Code, then five weeks of language-agnostic DSA in pseudocode — so the round that rejects strong AI portfolios doesn't reject yours.

WHAT YOU'LL LEARN
›AI-powered interview prep with Claude Code
›Sorting algorithms & complexity analysis
›Recursion & backtracking
›Trees, heaps & tries
›Graphs: BFS, DFS, shortest paths
›Dynamic programming patterns
TOOLS
Claude CodeLanguage-agnosticPseudocode
×
Agentic AI
10
BUILDS: THE PROOF
09 · Track 2 of 3

Build real agentic systems.
Not tutorials.

RAG pipelines, multi-agent orchestration, observability and MCP — the exact building blocks GCCs are desperate to hire for, ending in a portfolio-ready capstone you present on demo day.

WHAT YOU'LL LEARN
›RAG pipelines & vector databases
›Multi-agent systems with LangGraph
›Observability & evaluation
›Model Context Protocol (MCP) & deployment
›End-to-end capstone & demo day
TOOLS
LangChainLangGraphChromaDBPineconeLangSmithMCPStreamlitHugging FaceOpenAI

The Proof
12
11 · Projects You'll Build

Proof of delivery beats
a keyword-stuffed resume.

Recruiters look for one signal above all: evidence you've shipped. You'll graduate with a portfolio that shows it, not a certificate that claims it.

THE BUILD WORKFLOW
1
Guided Builds
Weeks 7-9

Hands-on projects introducing RAG pipelines, multi-agent orchestration and MCP tool use — one concept at a time, each committed to GitHub.

2
Applied Systems
Weeks 9-11

Combine it all into a working multi-agent application with real observability and evaluation built in — the kind of system GCCs actually run.

3
Capstone & Demo Day
Week 11

A production-ready AI application, presented and defended. Not a class assignment — the centrepiece recruiters open first.

The Format
14
13 · How You'll Learn

Live where it counts.
Self-paced where it helps.

DSA and Agentic AI run live for real-time feedback and accountability. Python Fundamentals is self-paced — skip it if you already code in Python.

● LIVE
●Live instructor-led classes with MAANG+ practitioners
●Hands-on coding practice & weekly assignments
●Mentor feedback and code review
●Structured capstone milestones with support
◯ SELF-PACED
●Self-paced Python foundations module
●AI-powered practice tools between sessions
●Recorded mock interview library
●Complete on your own schedule

Career Support
15
14 · Career Acceleration Services

Learning is half the journey.
Getting hired is the rest.

Resume Building & Review

ATS-friendly resume with recruiter-focused feedback — the fix for resumes that get silently screened out.

LinkedIn & GitHub

Profile and portfolio built to be found and to hold up under scrutiny.

AIQ Analyser & Roadmap

Your Agentic AI Readiness Score, a skill-gap analysis, and a plan built around it.

2 Live Mocks · MAANG+

Real interview reps with engineers who run these loops for a living.

Unlimited AI Mocks

Practise between rounds; study how top candidates think under pressure.

Behavioural & Negotiation

STAR-framework coaching and the confidence to negotiate, not just accept.

5
Application Opportunities
When you meet the criteria, our Careers Team puts your profile forward for relevant openings. Subject to eligibility and IK's terms — opportunities to apply, not a guarantee.

Recruiter Connect
16
15 · 1:1 Recruiter ConnectDELIVERED BY

The person who screens you out,
telling you exactly why.

Most engineers never find out why their profile gets passed over. This 30-minute consultation puts you in front of a senior recruiter who will tell you — and show you how to fix it.

01
1:1 Session

A private 30-minute conversation with a recruiter who hires for GCCs, MNCs and Fortune 500 companies.

02
Resume Review

The recruiter's real read on your resume — positioning, impact, and where it's silently failing ATS.

03
Career Positioning

How to frame your experience for the exact roles and seniority you're targeting.

04
Action Plan

A clear, practical list of what to change to start getting shortlisted.

ELIGIBILITY — Recruiter Connect, provided by Talent500, is available to learners with 0 to less than 5 years of experience. It currently applies to these IK tracks: Backend, Full Stack, Frontend, Test, iOS, Android, Early Engineering, Machine Learning, Data Engineering, Data Science, Embedded Systems, Site Reliability Engineering and Cyber Security. It does not currently apply to Engineering Manager, Technical Program Manager, Product Manager (Tech), Data Analyst & Business Analyst, or AWS Cloud Solutions Architect. This program is an eligible track.

Answers
19
18 · Frequently Asked Questions

Questions, answered.

What does the 14-week program cover?

DSA, Agentic AI engineering and career readiness. DSA and Agentic AI are live, plus 2 live mock interviews with MAANG+ engineers and full career support.

Is it live or self-paced?

Both. DSA and Agentic AI run live. Python Fundamentals is self-paced so you can complete it around your schedule.

What does it cost?

₹70,000, with 0%% no-cost EMI from ₹5,834/month. Scholarships and financing are confirmed live in the free session.

Is there a refund policy?

Yes. A 14-day refund window from your first class, with same-day processing.

Who is this course for?

Tech professionals with less than 5 years of experience, working in or transitioning into roles from Android to SRE and QE/SDET.

Do I need to be working already?

No. Final-year students, new grads and engineers in their first roles are all welcome.

What background do I need?

Basic programming knowledge in any language and core CS concepts. No prior AI/ML experience required.

What will I be able to build?

You'll design and deploy agentic AI systems, solve DSA at interview level, and handle the full interview loop at top tech companies.

How long to see results?

Most learners start applying within 4-8 weeks after completing the program. Timelines vary with background and effort.
